title: Pyramid Text Utterance 1012
source: Pyramid of Unas; Coffin of Sesenebnef
description: Pyramid Text Utterance 1012 from the ancient Egyptian funerary corpus.
introduction: Pyramid Text Utterance 1012 from the ancient Egyptian funerary corpus.

translation.text: From Pyramid Text Utterance 1012: An ancient Egyptian spell to empower the deceased's journey through the underworld and into the company of the gods.
